root_text.an3.56:1.1: Atha kho aññataro brāhmaṇamahāsālo yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami …pe… ekamantaṁ nisinno kho so brāhmaṇamahāsālo bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.an3.56:1.2: “sutaṁ metaṁ, bho gotama, pubbakānaṁ brāhmaṇānaṁ vuddhānaṁ mahallakānaṁ ācariyapācariyānaṁ bhāsamānānaṁ:
root_text.an3.56:1.3: ‘pubbe sudaṁ ayaṁ loko avīci maññe phuṭo ahosi manussehi, kukkuṭasaṁpātikā gāmanigamarājadhāniyo’ti.
root_text.an3.56:1.4: Ko nu kho, bho gotama, hetu ko paccayo yenetarahi manussānaṁ khayo hoti, tanuttaṁ paññāyati, gāmāpi agāmā honti, nigamāpi anigamā honti, nagarāpi anagarā honti, janapadāpi ajanapadā hontī”ti?
root_text.an3.56:2.2: Te adhammarāgarattā visamalobhābhibhūtā micchādhammaparetā tiṇhāni satthāni gahetvā aññamaññaṁ jīvitā voropenti, tena bahū manussā kālaṁ karonti.
root_text.an3.56:2.3: Ayampi kho, brāhmaṇa, hetu ayaṁ paccayo yenetarahi manussānaṁ khayo hoti, tanuttaṁ paññāyati, gāmāpi agāmā honti, nigamāpi anigamā honti, nagarāpi anagarā honti, janapadāpi ajanapadā honti.
root_text.an3.56:3.1: Puna caparaṁ, brāhmaṇa, etarahi manussā adhammarāgarattā visamalobhābhibhūtā micchādhammaparetā.
root_text.an3.56:3.2: Tesaṁ adhammarāgarattānaṁ visamalobhābhibhūtānaṁ micchādhammaparetānaṁ devo na sammādhāraṁ anuppavecchati.
root_text.an3.56:3.3: Tena dubbhikkhaṁ hoti dussassaṁ setaṭṭhikaṁ salākāvuttaṁ.
root_text.an3.56:3.5: Ayampi kho, brāhmaṇa, hetu ayaṁ paccayo yenetarahi manussānaṁ khayo hoti, tanuttaṁ paññāyati, gāmāpi agāmā honti, nigamāpi anigamā honti, nagarāpi anagarā honti, janapadāpi ajanapadā honti.
root_text.an3.56:4.1: Puna caparaṁ, brāhmaṇa, etarahi manussā adhammarāgarattā visamalobhābhibhūtā micchādhammaparetā.
root_text.an3.56:4.2: Tesaṁ adhammarāgarattānaṁ visamalobhābhibhūtānaṁ micchādhammaparetānaṁ yakkhā vāḷe amanusse ossajjanti, tena bahū manussā kālaṁ karonti.
root_text.an3.56:4.3: Ayampi kho, brāhmaṇa, hetu ayaṁ paccayo yenetarahi manussānaṁ khayo hoti, tanuttaṁ paññāyati, gāmāpi agāmā honti, nigamāpi anigamā honti, nagarāpi anagarā honti, janapadāpi ajanapadā hontī”ti.
root_text.an3.56:5.2: upāsakaṁ maṁ bhavaṁ gotamo dhāretu ajjatagge pāṇupetaṁ saraṇaṁ gatan”ti.

translation_text.an3.56:1.1: Then a well-to-do Brahmin went up to the Buddha, and seated to one side he said to him:
translation_text.an3.56:1.2: “Worthy Gotama, I have heard that brahmins of the past who were elderly and senior, the tutors of tutors, said:
translation_text.an3.56:1.3: ‘In the old days this world was so full of humans you’d think they were squashed together. The villages, towns and capital cities were no more than a chicken’s flight apart.’
translation_text.an3.56:1.4: What is the cause, sir, what is the reason why these days human numbers have dwindled, a decline in population is evident, and whole villages, towns, cities, and countries have disappeared?”
translation_text.an3.56:2.1: “These days, brahmin, humans just love illicit desire. They’re overcome by immoral greed, and mired in wrong custom.
translation_text.an3.56:2.2: Taking up sharp knives, they murder each other. And so many people perish.
translation_text.an3.56:2.3: This is the cause, this is the reason why these days human numbers have dwindled.
translation_text.an3.56:3.1: Furthermore, because these days humans just love illicit desire …
translation_text.an3.56:3.2: the heavens don’t provide enough rain,
translation_text.an3.56:3.3: so there’s famine, a bad harvest, with crops blighted and turned to straw.
translation_text.an3.56:3.5: This is the cause, this is the reason why these days human numbers have dwindled.
translation_text.an3.56:4.1: Furthermore, because these days humans just love illicit desire …
translation_text.an3.56:4.2: native spirits let vicious monsters loose. And so many humans perish.
translation_text.an3.56:4.3: This is the cause, this is the reason why these days human numbers have dwindled.”
translation_text.an3.56:5.2: From this day forth, may the worthy Gotama remember me as a lay follower who has gone for refuge for life.”

variant_text.an3.56:1.3: pubbe sudaṁ → pubbassudaṁ (bj, sya-all, km, pts1ed) | ahosi → hoti (bj, sya-all)

reference_text.an3.56:1.1: csp1ed15.160, csp2ed15.160, ms15A3_346, msdiv57, pts-vp-pli1.160, vri35.187
